top_signals.title: Top House Republican’s family investment poised to benefit from SpaceX IPO
top_signals.summary: Republican Rep. Lisa McClain’s husband bought up to $250,000 in Elon Musk’s xAI before it was folded into SpaceX ahead of its IPO.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
